acceptance_targets: [ch06_prose_01] Pass if no more than two 'not ... exactly' hedge constructions remain across the cited lines and each revised beat reads with a distinct sentence shape. Fail if three or more of the cited moments still rely on the same hedge formula.

[ch06_prose_02] Pass if the cited beats read as complete sentences or a complete question while preserving urgency, with no more than one isolated noun-phrase fragment left across those three pressure points. Fail if the revised chapter still stacks clipped fragments in all three places.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than two 'not ... exactly' hedge constructions remain across the cited lines and each revised beat reads with a distinct sentence shape. Fail if three or more of the cited moments still rely on the same hedge formula.
findings.problem: The chapter reuses the same self-correcting hedge construction ('not ... exactly') at least five times. Once or twice it can sharpen perception; at this frequency it becomes a recognizable prose tic and flattens distinct moments into the same sentence move.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework at least three of the repeated hedge beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:37, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:136, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:210, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:304, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:360 so those perceptions land through different syntax or more direct naming instead of the same corrective formula.

findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the cited beats read as complete sentences or a complete question while preserving urgency, with no more than one isolated noun-phrase fragment left across those three pressure points. Fail if the revised chapter still stacks clipped fragments in all three places.
findings.problem: At several pressure points the narration drops into clipped noun-phrase fragments ('Not a door slamming. A queue.'; 'No paper in his hand. No number. No plan.'; 'Incoming to where.'). Used this often, the emphasis starts to feel mannered, and it runs against the constitution's ban on elliptical clipping in narration.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:122, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:210, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_06.md:238, recast the emphasis into grammatically complete sentences or a fully formed interior question. Keep one fragment only if it earns unique force rather than serving as the chapter's default pressure marker.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into embarrassment, erotic consequence, moral compromise, and the ugly arithmetic of poverty. When a scene turns on prejudice, bureaucracy, violence, or family betrayal, stay with the room long enough for the reader to feel what each choice costs. Resolve edge cases by choosing the more specific and less flattering truth unless it breaks established character logic.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If sex, racism, injury, debt, hunger, or shame is rendered abstractly, rewrite until the bodily detail, social pressure, and changed leverage are visible on the page.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: high — contractions are the spoken norm across the novel; uncontracted forms should appear only for emphasis, ceremony, legal language, or character-specific pressure.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count, dialogue density, and chapter motor across the book: pair public humiliation with private aftermath, follow argument chapters with information-turn or weather chapters, preserve at least three genuinely quiet domestic or communal stretches, and never let more than three chapters in a row hinge on debate followed by decisive action.
prose_style_profile.diction: Contemporary and concrete, with Caribbean-American texture carried naturally in syntax and reference rather than in italicized glossary behavior; lyrical when earned, blunt when the room turns brutal.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: close third person that rotates by chapter; intimate enough for bodily shame and private contradiction, but alert to class performance, racial reading, and room dynamics.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate lean pressure sentences with occasional longer image-bearing sentences; lyric lift should arrive at emotional turns, never as constant prestige haze.
